source_rationale: Those are MIR29C (hsa-mir-29c-3p mature miRNA) in CD4+ T cells; MIR143 (hsa-mir-143-3p) in monocytes; MIR3609 (hsa-mir-3609) in neutrophils; MIR27A (hsa-mir-27a-5p) in fibroblasts; MIRLET7F (hsa-let-7f-5p), MIR100 (hsa-miR-100-5p) and MIR21 (hsa-miR-21-5p) in osteoblasts; and MIR1290 (hsa-miR-1290), MIR1246 (hsa-miR-1246) and MIR335 (hsa-miR-335-5p) in preadipocytes.
